body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
update to latest dependencies
closes #690

## Content
- CLIMAParameters -> ClimaParams: This PR touches a lot of files because of the renaming of ClimaParams
- ClimaLand v0.11: Albedo struct types were renamed, and BucketModelParameters constructor changed following ClimaLand's switch to using ClimaParams. Note that for some parameters we aren't using the defaults (but probably could)
- ClimaCore v0.13: Removed a few deprecated functions, which were only being used in seabreeze
title: update deps
